name: EVERTUBS
label: DA-1 R Ever Had Tubes Tied/Cut/Removed
universe: Applicable for all respondents

distribution.label: YES had tubal sterilization, including Essure
YES had tubal sterilization, but already reversed
NO did not have tubal sterilization

name: TUBSDATE_Y
label: DA-1y Year or R's tubal sterilization
universe: Applicable if R reported tubal sterilization (DA-1 EVERTUBS = 1 or 3)
notes: The month and century-month variables for this event have been suppressed for public use, but are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: EVERHYST
label: DA-2 R Ever Had Hysterectomy
universe: Applicable if R is not currently pregnant (currpreg = 5)

name: HYSTDATE_Y
label: DA-2y Year of R's hysterectomy
universe: Applicable if R reported having a hysterectomy (DA-2 EVERHYST = 1)
notes: The month and century-month variables for this event have been suppressed for public use, but are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: HYST
label: R is surgically sterile at interview due to hysterectomy (computed in FC D-2)
universe: Applicable for all respondents

name: SAMEOPER
label: DA-3 Hysterectomy and tubal done in same operation
universe: Applicable if R reported same mo/yr for tubal sterilization and hysterectomy (cmtubal = cmhyst)

name: OTHROPS1_1
label: DA-4 Were ovaries or tubes removed during hysterectomy - 1st mention
universe: Applicable if R reported a hysterectomy but not a tubal sterilization (hyst = 1 and DA-1 EVERTUBS NE 1 or 3)

name: OTHROPS1_2
label: DA-4 Were ovaries or tubes removed during hysterectomy - 2nd mention
universe: Applicable if R reported selected more than response for DA-4 OTHROPS1

name: OTHROPS2_1
label: DA-5 Were ovaries or tubes removed in other operation - 1st mention
universe: Applicable if R reported neither a hysterectomy nor a tubal sterilization (hyst = 5 and DA-1 EVERTUBS NE 1 or 3)

name: OTHROPS2_2
label: DA-5 Were ovaries or tubes removed in other operation - 2nd mention
universe: Applicable if R reported selected more than response for DA-5 OTHROPS2

name: OTHSTER
label: DA-6 Had this other surgery since January 4 years ago
universe: Applicable if R reported any removal of tubes or ovaries separate from hysterectomy or tubal sterilization (DA-5 OTHROPS2_1 = 1 or 2)

name: RHADALL
label: DA-7 R had all the children she wanted at time of her tubal sterilization
universe: Applicable if R ever had tubal sterilization before or at same time as any hysterectomy (DA-1 EVERTUBS = 1 or 3 and (hyst = 5 or (hyst = 1 and ((DA-3 SAMEOPER 5 or DK/RF) or (cmhyst > cmtubal))

name: HHADALL
label: DA-8 R's H/P had all the children hhe wanted at time of tubal sterilization
universe: Applicable if R ever had tubal sterilization before or at same time as any hysterectomy (DA-1 EVERTUBS = 1 or 3 and (hyst = 5 or (hyst = 1 and ((DA-3 SAMEOPER 5 or DK/RF) or (cmhyst > cmtubal))

distribution.label: You were not in a relationship with a man at the time you

name: FMEDREAS
label: DA-9 R had any medical reasons for having her tubal sterilization
universe: Applicable if R ever had tubal sterilization before or at same time as any hysterectomy (DA-1 EVERTUBS = 1 or 3 and (hyst = 5 or (hyst = 1 and ((DA-3 SAMEOPER 5 or DK/RF) or (cmhyst > cmtubal))

name: BCREAS
label: DA-10 R or her H/P had any problems w/other birth control methods used before having tubal sterilization
universe: Applicable if R ever had tubal sterilization before or at same time as any hysterectomy (DA-1 EVERTUBS = 1 or 3 and (hyst = 5 or (hyst = 1 and ((DA-3 SAMEOPER 5 or DK/RF) or (cmhyst > cmtubal))

name: BCWHYF
label: DA-11 Type of problem R or H/P had with other birth control methods
universe: Applicable if R reported a birth control problem as a reason for her tubal sterilization (DA-10 BCREAS = 1)

name: TUBLMAIN
label: DA-11b Main reason for R having her tubal sterilization
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 1 reason for her tubal sterilization (more than 1 "yes" response among DA-7 RHADALL, DA-8 HHADALL, DA-9 FMEDREAS, and DA-10 BCREAS)

distribution.label: You had all the children you wanted
Your husband or partner had all the children he wanted
Problems with other methods of birth control
Some other reason not mentioned above

name: PAYTUBAL_1
label: DA-12 How bill for tubal sterilization was paid - 1st mention
universe: Applicable if R had her tubal steriization in or after January of 5 years before interview (cmtubal >= cmjan5yr) and met criiteria for DA-7 RHADALL

name: PAYTUBAL_2
label: DA-12 How bill for tubal sterilization was paid - 2nd mention
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 1 type of payment for her tubal sterilization (see DA-12 PAYTUBAL_1)

name: ANYFSTER
label:
Whether R has had any sterilizing operations or procedures, regardless of later reversal (computed in FC D-
7b)
universe: Applicable for all respondents

name: ANYVASEC
label: DB-1 R's current H/P ever had a vasectomy
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to or cohabiting with a man (rmarit = 1 or 2)

distribution.label: YES had vasectomy, but already reversed

name: VASDATE_Y
label: DB-2y Year of vasectomy for R's current H/P
universe: Applicable if R reported her current husband or cohabiting partner has ever had a vasectomy (DB-1 ANYVASEC = 1 or 3)
notes: The month and century-month variables for this event have been suppressed for public use, but are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: WITHIMOP
label: DB-3 was R in relationship w/ current H/P when he had vasectomy
universe: Applicable if this vasectomy occurred before R married current husband (cmvasec < cmmarrch)

name: VASJAN4YR
label: DB-4 Did R's current H/P have his vasectomy since January of 4 years ago
universe: Applicable if R was not in relationship with current husband or cohabiting partner at time of his vasectomy (DB-3 WITHIMOP = 5 or DK/RF) and vasectomy date was not reported (cmvasec = DK/RF)

name: PAYVAS_1
label: DB-5 How was bill for vasectomy paid - 1st mention
universe: Applicable if vasectomy for R's current husband or cohabiting partner was done in or after January of 5 years before inter view (cmvasec > cmjan5yr)

name: PAYVAS_2
label: DB-5 How was bill for vasectomy paid - 2nd mention
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 1 type of payment for her husband or cohabiting partner's vasectomy (see DB-5 PAYVAS_1)

name: REVSTUBL
label: DC-1 Ever had surgery to reverse tubal sterilization
universe: Applicable if R reported tubal sterilization (DA-1 EVERTUBS = 1 or 3)

name: DATRVSTB_Y
label: DC-2y Year of R's tubal sterilization reversal
universe: Applicable if R reported reversal of her tubal sterilization (DC-1 REVSTUBL = 1)
notes: The month and century-month variables for this event have been suppressed for public use, but are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: REVSVASX
label: DC-3 R's Current H/P Ever Had Surgery to Reverse Vasectomy
universe: Applicable if R reported her current husband or cohabiting partner has ever had a vasectomy (DB-1 ANYVASEC = 1 or 3)

name: DATRVVEX_Y
label: DC-4y Year of current H/Ps vasectomy reversal
universe: Applicable if R reported her current husband or cohabiting partner ever had his vasectomy reversed (DC-3 REVSVASX = 1)
notes: The month and century-month variables for this event have been suppressed for public use, but are accessible by application to the NCHS Research Data Center.

name: TUBS
label:
R is surgically sterile at interview due to tubal sterilization, either unreversed or reversal failure (computed
in FC D-16)
universe: Applicable for all respondents

name: VASECT
label:
R's current H/P is surgically sterile at interview due to vasectomy, either unreversed or reversal failure
(computed in FC D-16)
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to or cohabiting with a man (rmarit = 1 or 2)

name: RSURGSTR
label: Whether R is Surgically Sterile at Interview (computed in FC D-16)
universe: Applicable for all respondents

name: PSURGSTR
label: Whether R's Current H/P is Surgically Sterile at Interview (computed in FC D-16)
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to or cohabiting with a man (rmarit = 1 or 2)

name: ONLYTBVS
label: Whether R & H/P's Only Sterile Ops are Tubal and/or Vasectomy (computed in FC D-16)
universe: Applicable for all respondents

name: RWANTRVT
label: DC-5 R Wants to Reverse Her Tubal Ligation
universe: Applicable if R is currently surgically sterile due to tubal sterilization or her current husband or cohabiting partner is currently surgical sterile from a vasectomy (tubs = 1 or vasect = 1), and R has had no other sterilization operations (onlytbvs = 1)

name: MANWANTT
label: DC-6 R's Current H/P Wants R to Reverse Her Tubal Ligation
universe: Applicable if R is currently surgically sterile due to tubal sterilization or her current husband or cohabiting partner is currently surgical sterile from a vasectomy (tubs = 1 or vasect = 1), and R has had no other sterilization operations (onlytbvs = 1)

name: RWANTREV
label: DC-7 R Wants H/P to Reverse His Vasectomy
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to or cohabiting with a man (rmarit = 1 or 2), her husband/partner is currently surgical sterile from a vasectomy (vasect = 1), and R has had no sterilization operations other than a tubal (onlytbvs = 1)

name: MANWANTR
label: DC-8 R's current H/P Wants to Reverse His Vasectomy
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to or cohabiting with a man (rmarit = 1 or 2), her husband/partner is currently surgical sterile from a vasectomy (vasect = 1), and R has had no sterilization operations other than a tubal (onlytbvs = 1)

name: POSIBLPG
label: DD-1 Physically Possible for R to Have a Baby
universe: Applicable if R is neither surgically sterile nor pregnant (rsurgstr = no and currpreg = no)

name: REASIMPR
label: DD-2 Main reason why impossible for R to have a baby
universe: Applicable if R reported that it is not physically possible for her to have a(nother) baby (DD-1 POSIBLPG = 5)

distribution.label: Impossible due to problems with ovulation
Impossible due to problems with uterus, cervix, or
Impossible due to other illnesses or treatment for other

name: POSIBLMN
label: DD-3 Physically possible for R's current H/P to father a baby
universe: Applicable if R is neither surgically sterile nor pregnant (rsurgstr = no and currpreg = no), she is currently married to or cohabiting with a man (rmarit = 1 or 2), and her current husband/partner is not surgically sterile (psurgstr = no)

name: REASIMPP
label: DD-4 Main reason why impossible for R's current H/P to father a baby
universe: Applicable if R reported that it is not physically possible for her current husband or cohabiting partner to father a(nother) baby in the future (DD-3 POSIBLMN = 5)

distribution.label: Impossible due to problems with sperm or semen
Impossible due to testicular problems or varicocele
Impossible due to other illnesses or treatment for other

name: CANHAVER
label: DE-1 Physically Difficult for R to Have a Baby
universe: Applicable if R did not report it was physically impossible for her to have a(nother) baby (DD-1 POSIBLPG = 1 or DK/RF)

name: REASDIFF_1
label: DE-2 Why physically difficult for R to have baby (1st mention)
universe: Applicable if R reported it is physically difficult for her to have a(nother) baby (DE-1 CANHAVER = 1)

distribution.label: You have difficulty carrying baby to term
Pregnancy is dangerous to your health
You are likely to have an unhealthy baby

name: REASDIFF_2
label: DE-2 Why physically difficult for R to have baby (2nd mention)
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 1 reason why it is physically difficult for her to have a(nother) baby (see DE-2 REASDIFF_1)

distribution.label: You have difficulty carrying baby to term
Pregnancy is dangerous to your health
You are likely to have an unhealthy baby

name: REASDIFF_3
label: DE-2 Why physically difficult for R to have baby (3rd mention)
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 2 reasons why it is physically difficult for her to have a(nother) baby (see DE-2 REASDIFF_1)

distribution.label: You have difficulty carrying baby to term
Pregnancy is dangerous to your health
You are likely to have an unhealthy baby

name: REASDIFF_4
label: DE-2 Why physically difficult for R to have baby (4th mention)
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 3 reasons why it is physically difficult for her to have a(nother) baby (see DE-2 REASDIFF_1)

distribution.label: You have difficulty carrying baby to term
You are likely to have an unhealthy baby

name: REASDIFF_5
label: DE-2 Why physically difficult for R to have baby (5th mention)
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 4 reasons why it is physically difficult for her to have a(nother) baby (see DE-2 REASDIFF_1)

name: CANHAVEM
label: DE-3 R's current H/P has physical difficulty fathering a baby
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to or cohabiting with a man (rmarit = 1 or 2), and R did not report that it is physically impossible for her husband/partner to father a(nother) baby in the future (DD-3 POSIBLMN = 1 or DK/RF)

name: PREGNONO
label: DE-4 Doctor Ever Advised R Never to Become Pregnant
universe: Applicable if R is not surgically sterile (rsurgstr = no)

name: REASNONO_1
label: DE-5 Why R was advised against pregnancy - 1st mention
universe: Applicable if R reported that a doctor has ever advised her not to become pregnant (again) (DE-4 PREGNONO = 1)

name: REASNONO_2
label: DE-5 Why R was advised against pregnancy - 2nd mention
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 1 reason why a doctor advised her not to become pregnant (again) (see DE-5 REASNONO_1)

name: REASNONO_3
label: DE-5 Why R was advised against pregnancy - 3rd mention
universe: Applicable if R reported more than 2 reasons why a doctor advised her not to become pregnant (again) (see DE-5 REASNONO_1)

name: RSTRSTAT
label: Respondent's Sterility Status at Time of Interview (computed in FC D-27)
universe: Applicable for all respondents

name: PSTRSTAT
label: Sterility Status of R's Current H/P at Time of Interview (computed in FC D-27)
universe: Applicable if R is currently married to or cohabiting with a man (rmarit = 1 or 2)

name: LASTPER
label: DE-6 Recency of last menstrual period
universe: Applicable if R has ever had a period (BA-1 MENARCHE NE 96), is not currently pregnant (currpreg = 5), and still has her uterus and ovaries (hyst = 5 and DA-5 OTHROPS2 NE 1)

distribution.label: Longer ago than 4 weeks, but less than 3 months
Longer ago than 3 months, but less than 6 months
Longer ago than 6 months, but less than 1 year

name: TRYPREG12
label: DE-7 Tried to get pregnant within past 12 months
universe: Applicable if R is 18 or older (age_r >= 18), has ever had a period (BA-1 MENARCHE NE 96), is not currently pregnant (currpreg = 5), has not been pregnant in past year (cmlstprg < cmlstyr), and is not surgically sterile (rstrstat = 0 or 2)
